title: CI flake: network prune test: netavark: failed to get bridge interface: Netlink error: ENODEV
body:
One-off (so far) in [f40 root](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5502147419176960/html/int-podman-fedora-40-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-network-podman-network-prune--1):
```
[+0581s] • [FAILED] [1.170 seconds]
         Podman network
           [It] podman network prune
....
           # podman [options] network rm -f macvlan3a9271f677325cd3f2cec044331defd870b46cb4de15488d07289118c50669d72
           Error: cleaning up container cad476f0665638f3b22179920810569836a813c8475e3021b725484fd3b07155: removing container cad476f0665638f3b22179920810569836a813c8475e3021b725484fd3b07155 network: netavark: failed to get bridge interface: Netlink error: No such device (os error 19)
           # podman [options] network rm -f macvlan3a9271f677325cd3f2cec044331defd870b46cb4de15488d07289118c50669d71

           [FAILED] Exit code must be 0 or 1
           Expected
               <int>: 125
           to be <=
               <int>: 1
```

comments.body: All the test using useCustomNetworkDir() cannot be run in parallel when they start containers, I will fix that later
